description: Governed feature packets (Level 5). Add a feature here with testPathPattern (and optional testModuleDir for modules/* layout). All entries run via npm run test:features. legacyModuleDirs are pre-governance tests — migrate into features[] over time.

features.description: Scoped RAG context injection + dynamic retrieval fallback
Document generation — section-specific RAG context, template paragraphs, job resumption
